title: Delicate Korean Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish using delicate noodles, Korean chili flakes, and fernbrake for added texture.
instructions: Cook the delicate noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the fernbrake and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly tender.
Add the green onions and cook for an additional minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the light soy sauce and Korean chili flakes.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the fernbrake mixture and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss everything together.
